narrative:
09 court of appeals district has 782,267 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.3 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +2.7% D−R vs +0.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
